hypothesis: The deterministic obligation-shape extractor plus the delete/negate/paraphrase ablation transforms produce byte-stable, digest-round-trippable receipts on the frozen fixture plans, providing the scaffolding required for the Week-2 executor adapter and scoring rules.

controls.description: Rule-based obligation-shape extractor runs deterministically over both CT task-family fixtures without live-provider calls.
Delete, negate, and paraphrase transforms apply exactly once per matched modal via an atomic-alternation regex so no round-trip erases the ablation.

gates.criterion: The rule-based extractor returns identical ClaimBundle digests across repeated runs on the frozen fixtures.
Every claim yields exactly one delete, one negate, and one paraphrase ablation with a distinct modified-plan digest.
results/summary.json regenerates byte-for-byte from the frozen fixtures at seed 20260721.
